name: web

scripts.verify-overrides: node -e "const r=require('child_process').execSync('npm ls dompurify hono --json',{stdio:['ignore','pipe','ignore']}).toString();const t=JSON.parse(r);function find(n,o){if(!o)return null;if(o.dependencies&&o.dependencies[n])return o.dependencies[n].version;for(const k in o.dependencies||{}){const v=find(n,o.dependencies[k]);if(v)return v}return null}const d=find('dompurify',t);const h=find('hono',t);function cmp(v,min){const a=v.split('.').map(Number);const b=min.split('.').map(Number);for(let i=0;i<3;i++){if(a[i]>b[i])return 1;if(a[i]<b[i])return -1}return 0}if(!d||cmp(d,'3.4.0')<0){console.error('FAIL: dompurify '+d+' < 3.4.0 — GHSA-39q2-94rc-95cp regression');process.exit(1)}if(!h||cmp(h,'4.12.14')<0){console.error('FAIL: hono '+h+' < 4.12.14 — GHSA-458j-xx4x-4375 regression');process.exit(1)}console.log('verify-overrides OK: dompurify '+d+', hono '+h)"

//overrides: dompurify ^3.4.0 covers GHSA-39q2-94rc-95cp (ADD_TAGS bypass) until mermaid ships a newer dompurify range; hono ^4.12.14 covers GHSA-458j-xx4x-4375 (JSX HTML injection) until @modelcontextprotocol/sdk bumps its hono pin. Removal trigger: when `npm ls dompurify` / `npm ls hono` shows the parent natively resolves a satisfying version, delete that entry and re-run `npm install`. The `verify-overrides` script (wired via prebuild) guards against silent regression.
